steps.title: Sunlit Harvest
steps.desc: Hand-picked from fields where time moves slowly, just as our ancestors taught us.

steps.title: Chilled to Perfection
steps.desc: Cooled with care, reminding you of that first sip from a cold clay pitcher on a hot summer porch.

steps.title: A Taste of Home
steps.desc: A comforting, deeply satisfying flavor that feels like a warm embrace from the past.

quote: It tastes exactly like the summers I remember as a child. A truly precious memory in a cup.
author: A Grateful Soul

sensory.label: Sight
sensory.desc: The golden hue of endless summer days.

sensory.label: Smell
sensory.desc: A sweet, earthy aroma of rain on dry soil.

sensory.label: Taste
sensory.desc: A pure, honest sweetness that touches the soul.
